description_long: This handcart features a robust wooden frame with a flat, slatted load platform supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side. The rear of the cart is equipped with a short, vertical wooden barrier to help secure cargo, while the front extends into two long, sturdy wooden handles for manual pulling or pushing. The wheels are reinforced with visible metal bands, suggesting durability for heavy loads. The wood is dark-stained, showing a weathered, matte finish with visible grain and some roughness. The overall construction is simple yet functional, with no side rails and an open design for easy loading and unloading. This type of handcart is commonly used for transporting goods in urban or market environments.
description: A sturdy, wooden handcart with a slatted platform, two large spoked wheels, and long front handles, featuring a rear barrier for cargo support.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slatted wooden platform, large spoked wheel, rear barrier, and extended front handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual handles and the open, slatted platform with no side rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the wheel, platform, and rear barrier.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the short vertical barrier and the ends of the slatted platform, with both wheels visible.
